testcase.name: Countdown > renders the countdown value
Countdown > renders JÁ! when value is 0
Countdown > renders JÁ! when value is negative
ErrorBoundary > renders children when there is no error
ErrorBoundary > renders fallback UI when error occurs
ErrorBoundary > renders custom fallback when provided
Menu > renders the start button
Menu > renders difficulty select with NORMAL default
Menu > renders time select with 60s default
Menu > calls onStart with default values when start is clicked
Menu > calls onStart with selected difficulty and time
Menu > renders title when splash image fails to load
FeedbackOverlay > does not render when feedback is null
FeedbackOverlay > renders correctly when feedback is an error
FeedbackOverlay > renders correctly for a combo with streak count
HUDHeader > renders score and level
HUDHeader > renders time
HUDHeader > renders infinity symbol for INFINITE time
HUDHeader > renders difficulty label
HUDHeader > renders volume icon when not muted
HUDHeader > renders muted icon when muted
StreakBadge > does not render when streak is 0
StreakBadge > does not render when streak is 1
StreakBadge > renders with SEQUÊNCIA for streak 2-4
StreakBadge > renders with COMBO for streak 5-9
StreakBadge > renders with SUPER for streak 10-14
StreakBadge > renders with BERSERK for streak 15+
TurnIndicator > renders OBSERVE when playing sequence
TurnIndicator > renders SUA VEZ when waiting for input
TurnIndicator > does not render when game is IDLE
TurnIndicator > does not render when game is GAME_OVER
TurnIndicator > does not render during COUNTDOWN
UrgentIndicator > does not render anything when visible is false
UrgentIndicator > renders CORRA! when visible is true
useAchievements > should initialize with all achievements locked
useAchievements > should unlock achievement by id
useAchievements > should set recentlyUnlocked when unlocking
useAchievements > should clear recentlyUnlocked after 3 seconds
useAchievements > should not unlock the same achievement twice
useAchievements > should persist unlocked achievements to localStorage
useAchievements > should load achievements from localStorage on init
useAchievements > should check and unlock score-based achievements
useAchievements > should check and unlock streak-based achievements
useAchievements > should check and unlock level-based achievements
useAchievements > should unlock hardcore_win when hardcore with no errors
useAchievements > should not unlock hardcore_win when there are errors
useAchievements > should unlock perfect_game when no errors and score > 0
useAchievements > should reset all achievements
useAchievements > should handle localStorage corruption gracefully
useScoreHistory > should initialize with empty history
useScoreHistory > should add a score entry
useScoreHistory > should not add entry with score 0 or less
useScoreHistory > should not add entry with negative score
useScoreHistory > should limit history to 10 entries
useScoreHistory > should persist history to localStorage
useScoreHistory > should load history from localStorage on init
useScoreHistory > should clear history
useScoreHistory > should return best score
useScoreHistory > should return 0 for best score when history is empty
useScoreHistory > should handle localStorage corruption gracefully

testcase.name: useScoreHistory > should be loaded by default
generateEntropy > should return a number between 0 (inclusive) and 1 (exclusive)
generateEntropy > should produce varying values
generateEntropy > should not return NaN
useAppKeyboard > should toggle mute on M key
useAppKeyboard > should toggle mute on m key (lowercase)
useAppKeyboard > should not toggle mute when focused on INPUT
useAppKeyboard > should toggle shortcuts on H key
useAppKeyboard > should close shortcuts with Escape
useAppKeyboard > should close history with Escape
useAppKeyboard > should toggle pause with Escape when game is PAUSED
useAppKeyboard > should toggle pause with Escape when game is active
useAppKeyboard > should not pause when game is IDLE
useAppKeyboard > should not pause when game is GAME_OVER
useAppKeyboard > should not pause during COUNTDOWN
useAudio > should initialize with default muted state
useAudio > should toggle mute state
useAudio > should call play on audioController
useDebugActions > should initialize with debug mode disabled
useDebugActions > should toggle debug mode
useDebugActions > should add score through deps
useDebugActions > should trigger bonus effects
useDebugActions > should reset kagura after 2000ms on triggerBonus
useDebugActions > should set game over state
useDebugActions > should set timer value
useDebugActions > winLevel should ignore when game is IDLE
useDebugActions > winLevel should ignore when game is GAME_OVER
useDebugActions > winLevel should level up when game is active
pickMessage > should return a message from the array
pickMessage > should handle empty array gracefully
pickMessage > should pick different indices based on entropy
executeKaguraBonus > should do nothing for BERSERK difficulty
executeKaguraBonus > should do nothing for HARDCORE difficulty
executeKaguraBonus > should increment counter but not trigger before 15 clicks
executeKaguraBonus > should trigger bonus after 15 clicks for NORMAL difficulty
executeKaguraBonus > should not add time for INFINITE mode
executeKaguraBonus > should reset kaguraActive after 2000ms
MESSAGES_HARDCORE > should contain hardcore messages
useGameScore > should initialize with 0 score and streak
useGameScore > should increment score and streak
useGameScore > should update highscore
useGameScore > should reset score and streak
useGameSequence > should initialize correctly
useGameSequence > should add to sequence
useGameSequence > should play sequence
useGameSequence > should validate input correctly
useGameSequence > should fail on wrong input
useGameTimer > should initialize with correct time
useGameTimer > should countdown
useGameTimer > should call onTimeUp when time runs out
useGameTimer > should handle countdown value
